<<biography of eduard romanyuta>>

Eduard romanyuta is a ukrainian singer. He plays piano and guitar. He is known for his pop music. * * * He was born in ternopil. He started his career in 1996. He is a solo singer. * * * He represented moldova in 2015. His song failed to qualify.
